name: Elephant Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the elephant into small bite-sized pieces, which may take about 2 months.
2. Add enough brown gravy to cover the meat, approximately half a train tank car full.
3. Cook over kerosene heat for approximately 4 weeks at 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. This recipe serves 3,800 people. If more servings are needed, add 2 extra rabbits (optional).
